heading: Two sides, one platform
subheading: Built for both. Fair to both.

cards.label: For Creators
cards.title: Keep 100% of what you earn.
cards.description: No agency takes a cut. Sign real contracts. Escrow funded before you start. Payout in seven days, automatic.

cards.label: For Brands
cards.title: Access vetted creators only.
cards.description: Browse verified profiles. Run structured campaigns. Fund escrow once. Get the content you commissioned.
